solutions._comment: Minimal entry — just name and version. Defaults to deployMode=upgrade. No post-export version bump.
solutions.name: CoreComponents

solutions._comment: Standard upgrade with post-export version bump. After export, clones the solution in Dev to v2.2.0.0 (CloneAsSolution) so Dev is ready for the next cycle.
solutions.name: MainApp

solutions._comment: Creates a new patch in Dev after export (CloneAsPatch). The new patch is created at postExportVersion so developers immediately work on the patch. If the exported solution is itself a patch, the parent is used as the patch base and the old patch is prefixed with '(DO NOT USE)'.
solutions.name: CoreComponents

solutions._comment: Update strategy. deployMode=update skips --stage-and-upgrade. Use when the solution does not support staged upgrades.
solutions.name: DataConnectors

solutions._comment: Rolling back to a lower version. isRollback=true disables the version guard. postExportVersion and createNewPatch are ignored when isRollback=true.
solutions.name: LegacyIntegration

solutions._comment: Pre-built managed zip already in local/solutions/managed/. Export is skipped. postExportVersion is ignored when isExisting=true.
solutions.name: ThirdPartyPackage

solutions._comment: Power Pages solution. powerPagesConfiguration.deployMode controls the import strategy and takes precedence over the top-level deployMode.
solutions.name: CustomerPortal

configData._comment: Config data is extracted from Dev during export and upserted into the target environment during deploy.
configData.name: CountryCodes
